name: Ethiopian Spicy Braised Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the red pepper sauce first: Combine tomato sauce, paprika, 1/4 cup dry red wine, grated ginger root, red pepper, cardamom, nutmeg, cloves, cinnamon, and allspice. Set aside.
2. In a large skillet, cook onions and garlic in hot oil until onions are tender but not brown. Stir in the red pepper sauce, turmeric, and 1 teaspoon salt. Add chicken pieces to the skillet. Spoon the onion mixture over the chicken pieces.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil; reduce heat. Cover and simmer about 3 minutes. Stir in 1/4 cup dry red wine. Cook uncovered for an additional 15 minutes, stirring occasionally and skimming off any fat. Serve with Injeera (Ethiopian flat-bread).
